content.name: [VAS] Copy Station Logistic Config
content.description: Adds a right-click 'Copy Logistic Config from' action to player-owned stations. Select target station(s), right-click a source station and apply the source's per-ware storage allocation, buy/sell offers, pricing and trade rules to the targets. Inspired by HJ Copy Behaviour.
content.author: VasiliyTemniy
